revision.comment: add {{[[Template:CatAutoTOC|CatAutoTOC]]}}, which will generate a table of contents (TOC) if the category has enough pages to need one
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: redirect empty category
revision.text: #redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "#" to "[[Category:redirect categories]]"
revision.text: [[Category:redirect categories]]redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
revision.text: [[Category:redirect categories]]redirect [[en:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:redirect categories]] [[Category:Tier 0 Categories]]

revision.text:

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=13th-century_Buddhist_monks here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
